full_text:
Approximately 1.5 cm tissue piece was minced and dissociated in 5 ml of AdF++ medium containing 100 ul of 50U/ml dispase and 50ul of RNAse free DNAse, according to the protocol.

Final cell pellet was resuspended in 1 ml of AdF++ medium

Cell count 1):

total: 1.20 E6

live: 3.70 E5

viability: 30.7 %

Size: 7.9 um

Cell count 2):

total: 1.08 E6

live: 2.67 E5

viability: 24.8 %

Size: 6.9 um

Cell count: 1.14 E6 / mL

Total volume: 1 mL

Total cell count: 1.14 E6

As the ice section diagnosis was unclear we did not proceed further. Final cell pellet was frozen into 1 vial-> 1 ml of stem cell banker, with 1.14*E6 cells in the vial.
